promptDescription: - **nodetrix** — explore a network/graph with community structure: tightly-connected groups are drawn as adjacency-matrix blocks and the sparse links between groups as a node-link layout, avoiding the hairball a plain force diagram produces on dense data. Communities are detected automatically, so you only supply nodes + links. **Use lazy SQL** for non-trivial datasets — return one row per edge with `source`, `target`, `value` columns; the node list is derived automatically. Spec: (lazy SQL form) { "type":"nodetrix", "title":"...", "sql":"SELECT s.ip_address AS source, d.ip_address AS target, COUNT(*) AS value FROM net90.traffic_90min t JOIN net90.ip_map s ON s.ip_id=t.src_ip JOIN net90.ip_map d ON d.ip_id=t.dst_ip GROUP BY 1,2" }. Spec: (inline form, small examples only) { "type":"nodetrix", "title":"...", "nodes":[{"name":"A"},{"name":"B"},{"name":"C"}], "links":[{"source":0,"target":1,"value":1}], "clusters":[[0,1,2]] }. `clusters` is optional (auto-detected when omitted); link source/target may be node indices or node names.
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='400px';function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=cb;document.head.appendChild(s);}load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/dist/d3.min.js','d3',function(){var W=wrap.clientWidth||600,H=wrap.clientHeight||400;var nodes=(spec.nodes||[]).map(function(n,i){return{name:(n&&n.name!=null)?String(n.name):String(i)};});if(!nodes.length){d3.select(wrap).append('div').style('padding','16px').style('font','13px sans-serif').style('color','#888').text('Nodetrix: no nodes in data.');return;}var nameIdx={};nodes.forEach(function(n,i){if(!(n.name in nameIdx))nameIdx[n.name]=i;});function resolve(v){if(typeof v==='number'&&v>=0&&v<nodes.length)return v;var k=String(v);return(k in nameIdx)?nameIdx[k]:-1;}var links=[];(spec.links||[]).forEach(function(l){var s=resolve(l.source),t=resolve(l.target);if(s<0||t<0||s===t)return;links.push({source:s,target:t,value:(l.value==null?1:+l.value)});});var adj=nodes.map(function(){return{};});links.forEach(function(l){adj[l.source][l.target]=(adj[l.source][l.target]||0)+l.value;adj[l.target][l.source]=(adj[l.target][l.source]||0)+l.value;});var clusters;if(spec.clusters&&spec.clusters.length){clusters=spec.clusters.map(function(c){return c.map(resolve).filter(function(i){return i>=0;});}).filter(function(c){return c.length;});}else{var label=nodes.map(function(_,i){return i;}),order=nodes.map(function(_,i){return i;});for(var it=0;it<14;it++){for(var a=order.length-1;a>0;a--){var b=Math.floor(Math.random()*(a+1)),tmp=order[a];order[a]=order[b];order[b]=tmp;}var changed=false;order.forEach(function(i){var cnt={},best=label[i],bestv=0;for(var j in adj[i]){var lb=label[j];cnt[lb]=(cnt[lb]||0)+adj[i][j];if(cnt[lb]>bestv){bestv=cnt[lb];best=lb;}}if(best!==label[i]){label[i]=best;changed=true;}});if(!changed)break;}var groups={};label.forEach(function(lb,i){(groups[lb]=groups[lb]||[]).push(i);});clusters=Object.keys(groups).map(function(k){return groups[k];});}var MINM=3;var matrixClusters=clusters.filter(function(c){return c.length>=MINM;});var nodeCluster={};matrixClusters.forEach(function(c,ci){c.forEach(function(ni){nodeCluster[ni]=ci;});});var blocks=[];matrixClusters.forEach(function(c){var dim=c.length,cs=Math.max(4,Math.min(14,Math.floor((Math.min(W,H)*0.5)/dim)));blocks.push({type:'matrix',members:c.slice(),cellSize:cs});});nodes.forEach(function(n,ni){if(!(ni in nodeCluster))blocks.push({type:'node',members:[ni]});});var nodeBlock={};blocks.forEach(function(b,bi){b.members.forEach(function(ni){nodeBlock[ni]=bi;});});blocks.forEach(function(b){if(b.type==='matrix'){b.dim=b.members.length;b.w=b.dim*b.cellSize;b.h=b.w;b.r=b.w*0.72;}else{b.r=9;b.w=18;b.h=18;}});var within={};blocks.forEach(function(b,bi){if(b.type==='matrix')within[bi]={};});var bridgeMap={};links.forEach(function(l){var bs=nodeBlock[l.source],bt=nodeBlock[l.target];if(bs==null||bt==null)return;if(bs===bt){if(blocks[bs].type==='matrix'){var m=within[bs];m[l.source+'_'+l.target]=(m[l.source+'_'+l.target]||0)+l.value;m[l.target+'_'+l.source]=(m[l.target+'_'+l.source]||0)+l.value;}}else{var k=Math.min(bs,bt)+'_'+Math.max(bs,bt);bridgeMap[k]=(bridgeMap[k]||0)+l.value;}});var bridges=Object.keys(bridgeMap).map(function(k){var p=k.split('_');return{source:+p[0],target:+p[1],value:bridgeMap[k]};});var svg=d3.select(wrap).append('svg').attr('width',W).attr('height',H).style('cursor','grab');var g=svg.append('g');svg.call(d3.zoom().scaleExtent([0.15,4]).on('zoom',function(e){g.attr('transform',e.transform);}));var gB=g.append('g'),gN=g.append('g');var maxBridge=d3.max(bridges,function(d){return d.value;})||1;var bw=d3.scaleLinear().domain([0,maxBridge]).range([1,6]);var bridgeSel=gB.selectAll('line').data(bridges).enter().append('line').attr('stroke','#9ba6c4').attr('stroke-opacity',0.7).attr('stroke-width',function(d){return bw(d.value);});var blockSel=gN.selectAll('g').data(blocks).enter().append('g');blockSel.each(function(b,bi){var sel=d3.select(this);if(b.type==='matrix'){var m=within[bi],cs=b.cellSize,mem=b.members,maxv=1;mem.forEach(function(r){mem.forEach(function(c){var v=m[r+'_'+c]||0;if(v>maxv)maxv=v;});});var color=d3.scaleLinear().domain([0,maxv]).range(['#e9ebfb','#534AB7']);var grid=sel.append('g').attr('transform','translate('+(-b.w/2)+','+(-b.h/2)+')');mem.forEach(function(r,ri){mem.forEach(function(c,ci){var diag=ri===ci,v=diag?0:(m[r+'_'+c]||0);grid.append('rect').attr('x',ci*cs).attr('y',ri*cs).attr('width',cs).attr('height',cs).attr('fill',diag?'#c9cdef':(v>0?color(v):'#ffffff')).attr('stroke','#d7d9ea').attr('stroke-width',0.5);});});if(cs>=8){mem.forEach(function(r,ri){grid.append('text').attr('x',-4).attr('y',ri*cs+cs*0.72).attr('text-anchor','end').attr('font-size',Math.min(9,cs*0.7)).attr('fill','#555').text(nodes[r].name);});}}else{sel.append('circle').attr('r',b.r).attr('fill','#2E9CDB').attr('stroke','#1c6fa0').attr('stroke-width',1.5);sel.append('text').attr('y',b.r+11).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',9).attr('fill','#444').text(nodes[b.members[0]].name);}});var sim=d3.forceSimulation(blocks).force('charge',d3.forceManyBody().strength(-450)).force('link',d3.forceLink(bridges).distance(function(d){return 60+d.source.r+d.target.r;}).strength(0.3)).force('center',d3.forceCenter(W/2,H/2)).force('collide',d3.forceCollide().radius(function(d){return d.r+14;}));blockSel.call(d3.drag().on('start',function(e,d){if(!e.active)sim.alphaTarget(0.3).restart();d.fx=d.x;d.fy=d.y;}).on('drag',function(e,d){d.fx=e.x;d.fy=e.y;}).on('end',function(e,d){if(!e.active)sim.alphaTarget(0);d.fx=null;d.fy=null;}));sim.on('tick',function(){blockSel.attr('transform',function(b){return'translate('+b.x+','+b.y+')';});bridgeSel.attr('x1',function(d){return d.source.x;}).attr('y1',function(d){return d.source.y;}).attr('x2',function(d){return d.target.x;}).attr('y2',function(d){return d.target.y;});});if(spec.title)svg.append('text').attr('x',W/2).attr('y',20).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',14).attr('font-weight','bold').attr('fill','#333').text(spec.title);});}
